caption: A man with blond hair and glasses, wearing a dark blue t-shirt, is speaking into a black microphone on a stand. He is positioned in an indoor setting with a purple and red gradient background. To his left is a decorated Christmas tree with green needles and colorful lights. Behind him is a light-colored wall featuring a framed picture or monitor showing a partial image of a building and the number "10". The man remains in a similar position across the sequence, speaking and gesturing slightly with his head as he looks toward someone or something off-camera. The lighting remains consistent, and the overall composition of the scene stays the same, focusing on the man from the chest up as he talks.
